name: Arduino-BLE-MIDI
description: Vendored copy of lathoub/Arduino-BLE-MIDI v2.2.0 (BLE-MIDI over NimBLE). Vendored so its unversioned 'depends=NimBLE-Arduino' does not drag in NimBLE 2.x (whose API this v2.2.0 wrapper predates and which needs Arduino-ESP32 3.x). NimBLE 1.4.3 is pinned once at the project level in platformio.ini and is the single copy the wrapper links against. ArduinoBLE is intentionally omitted: only the ESP32/NimBLE hardware path is compiled here.
